---
title: "Lorenzo Fabbri"
lang: es
cv-tagline: "Investigador postdoctoral en Epidemiología"
cv-email: "lorenzo.fabbri92sm@gmail.com"
cv-location: "Madrid, España"
cv-website: "lorenzofabbri.github.io/epilorenzo"
cv-orcid: "0000-0003-3031-322X"
cv-scholar: "QbPv1H0AAAAJ"
cv-github: "lorenzoFabbri"
cv-linkedin: "lorenzo-fabbri-303185383"
cv-bluesky: "epilorenzo.bsky.social"
---

{{< include _partials/_setup.qmd >}}

{{< include _partials/_header.qmd >}}

{{< include _partials/es/_research-interests.qmd >}}

{{< include _partials/es/_appointments.qmd >}}

{{< include _partials/es/_education.qmd >}}

{{< include _partials/es/_research-visits.qmd >}}

{{< include _partials/es/_grants.qmd >}}

{{< include _partials/es/_honors.qmd >}}

{{< include _partials/es/_publications.qmd >}}

{{< include _partials/es/_software.qmd >}}

{{< include _partials/es/_talks.qmd >}}

{{< include _partials/es/_conferences.qmd >}}

{{< include _partials/es/_continuing-education.qmd >}}

{{< include _partials/es/_service.qmd >}}

{{< include _partials/es/_skills.qmd >}}

{{< include _partials/es/_footer.qmd >}}
